title: Matrix2D Object
description: Transient 2D 3x3 matrix. This object is a wrapper over 2D matrix data and is used as way to pass matrix data in and out of the API and as a convenience when operating on matrix data. They are created statically using the create method of the Matrix2D class.

methods.name: asArray
methods.description: Returns the contents of the matrix as a 9 element array.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Creates an independent copy of this matrix.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a transient 2D matrix (3x3) object. It is initialized as an identity matrix.

methods.name: getAsCoordinateSystem
methods.description: Gets the matrix data as the components that define a coordinate system.

methods.name: getCell
methods.description: Gets the value of the specified cell in the 3x3 matrix.

methods.name: isEqualTo
methods.description: Compares this matrix with another matrix and returns True if they're identical.

methods.name: setCell
methods.description: Sets the specified cell in the 3x3 matrix to the specified value.

methods.name: setToAlignCoordinateSystems
methods.description: Sets this matrix to be the matrix that maps from the 'from' coordinate system to the 'to' coordinate system.

methods.name: setToIdentity
methods.description: Resets this matrix to be an identity matrix.

methods.name: setToRotateTo
methods.description: Sets to the matrix of rotation that would align the 'from' vector with the 'to' vector.

methods.name: setToRotation
methods.description: Sets this matrix to the matrix of rotation by the specified angle, through the specified origin.

methods.name: setWithArray
methods.description: Sets the contents of the array using a 9 element array.

methods.name: setWithCoordinateSystem
methods.description: Reset this matrix to align with a specific coordinate system.

methods.name: transformBy
methods.description: Transforms this matrix using the input matrix.

properties.name: determinant
properties.description: Returns the determinant of the matrix.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

asArray.title: Matrix2D.asArray Method
asArray.description: Returns the contents of the matrix as a 9 element array.
asArray.return_description: Returns the array of matrix values.

classType.title: Matrix2D.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

copy.title: Matrix2D.copy Method
copy.description: Creates an independent copy of this matrix.

create.title: Matrix2D.create Method
create.description: Creates a transient 2D matrix (3x3) object. It is initialized as an identity matrix.

getAsCoordinateSystem.title: Matrix2D.getAsCoordinateSystem Method
getAsCoordinateSystem.description: Gets the matrix data as the components that define a coordinate system.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: The output origin point of the coordinate system.

parameters.name: xAxis
parameters.description: The output x axis direction of the coordinate system.

parameters.name: yAxis
parameters.description: The output y axis direction of the coordinate system.

getCell.title: Matrix2D.getCell Method
getCell.description: Gets the value of the specified cell in the 3x3 matrix.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The index of the row. The first row has in index of 0

parameters.name: column
parameters.description: The index of the column. The first column has an index of 0

isEqualTo.title: Matrix2D.isEqualTo Method
isEqualTo.description: Compares this matrix with another matrix and returns True if they're identical.
isEqualTo.return_description: Returns true if the matrix is equal to this matrix.

parameters.name: matrix
parameters.description: The matrix to compare to.

setCell.title: Matrix2D.setCell Method
setCell.description: Sets the specified cell in the 3x3 matrix to the specified value.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The index of the row. The first row has in index of 0

parameters.name: column
parameters.description: The index of the column. The first column has an index of 0

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The new value of the cell.

setToAlignCoordinateSystems.title: Matrix2D.setToAlignCoordinateSystems Method
setToAlignCoordinateSystems.description: Sets this matrix to be the matrix that maps from the 'from' coordinate system to the 'to' coordinate system.

syntax.python: returnValue = matrix2D_var.setToAlignCoordinateSystems(fromOrigin, fromXAxis, fromYAxis, toOrigin, toXAxis, toYAxis)
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = matrix2D_var->setToAlignCoordinateSystems(fromOrigin, fromXAxis, fromYAxis, toOrigin, toXAxis, toYAxis);

parameters.name: fromOrigin
parameters.description: The origin point of the from coordinate system.

parameters.name: fromXAxis
parameters.description: The x axis direction of the from coordinate system.

parameters.name: fromYAxis
parameters.description: The y axis direction of the from coordinate system.

parameters.name: toOrigin
parameters.description: The origin point of the to coordinate system.

parameters.name: toXAxis
parameters.description: The x axis direction of the to coordinate system.

parameters.name: toYAxis
parameters.description: The y axis direction of the to coordinate system.

setToIdentity.title: Matrix2D.setToIdentity Method
setToIdentity.description: Resets this matrix to be an identity matrix.

setToRotateTo.title: Matrix2D.setToRotateTo Method
setToRotateTo.description: Sets to the matrix of rotation that would align the 'from' vector with the 'to' vector.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: The from vector.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The to vector.

setToRotation.title: Matrix2D.setToRotation Method
setToRotation.description: Sets this matrix to the matrix of rotation by the specified angle, through the specified origin.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The rotation angle in radians.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: The origin point of the rotation.

setWithArray.title: Matrix2D.setWithArray Method
setWithArray.description: Sets the contents of the array using a 9 element array.

parameters.name: cells
parameters.description: The array of cell values.

setWithCoordinateSystem.title: Matrix2D.setWithCoordinateSystem Method
setWithCoordinateSystem.description: Reset this matrix to align with a specific coordinate system.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: The origin point of the coordinate system.

parameters.name: xAxis
parameters.description: The x axis direction of the coordinate system.

parameters.name: yAxis
parameters.description: The y axis direction of the coordinate system.

transformBy.title: Matrix2D.transformBy Method
transformBy.description: Transforms this matrix using the input matrix.

parameters.name: matrix
parameters.description: The transformation matrix.

determinant.title: Matrix2D.determinant Property
determinant.description: Returns the determinant of the matrix.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = matrix2D_var.determinant

isValid.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

syntax.python:

propertyValue = matrix2D_var.isValid

objectType.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object. It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():
